CONTENT.Career: Andriyevskyi is a product of the FC Metalist Kharkiv youth school system. He made his debut for FC Metalist in the match against FC Vorskla Poltava on 10 May 2012 in the Ukrainian Premier League along with another débutante, Oleksandr Azatskyi.In March 2015, Andriyevskyi joined FC Dynamo Kyiv.While playing for FC Zorya Luhansk, he made his debut at continental competitions and in October 2017 he was selected as a player of the month in the Ukrainian Premier League.In December 2020, the club Desna Chernihiv in the city of Chernihiv, showed interest in him.Andriyevskyi made his Ukraine national team debut on 10 November 2017, when he came on as a substitute in a friendly 2–1 win over Slovakia at Arena Lviv.
CONTENT.Honours: Dynamo KyivUkrainian Premier League: 2020–21Ukrainian Cup: 2020–21IndividualUkrainian Premier League player of the Month: 2017–18 (October)

SUMMARY: Oleksandr Petrovych Andriyevskyi (Ukrainian: Олександр Петрович Андрієвський; born 25 June 1994) is a Ukrainian professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Dynamo Kyiv in the Ukrainian Premier League.
